description_long: This object consists of four thick, rectangular books standing upright and closely packed together. Each book has a dark brown, solid-colored cover with no visible text, imagery, or decorative elements. The spines and covers are plain, giving the set a uniform and minimalist appearance. The pages are visible from the top and sides, appearing as tightly bound, white or light gray sheets. The books are of varying heights, creating a stepped effect when viewed from the side. The overall look is utilitarian and unadorned, suitable for a library, study, or urban reading nook.
description: A set of four thick, plain dark brown books with visible white pages and no cover illustration or text. The books are of varying heights and closely packed together.
description_view_0: The front view shows the plain, dark brown cover of the tallest book, with no visible text or illustration.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the white pages of all four books, highlighting their varying heights and the close arrangement.
description_view_2: The back view displays the plain brown covers of all four books, stacked in a stepped formation.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the spines and white pages, emphasizing the thickness and uniformity of the books.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain dark brown with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements.
